languages.text: "Ваша Светлость!" {n}Вивисектор Мартинакс переполнен возмущением настолько, что его голос звенит, заполняя собой эфир. {/n} "Некоторые пациенты демонстративно игнорируют правила приема, что напрямую сказывается на работе хирургеонов. Нижайше прошу вашего вмешательства!"

traits.locale_text: "Ваша Светлость!" {n}Вивисектор Мартинакс переполнен возмущением настолько, что оно почти звенит, заполняя собой эфир. {/n} "Некоторые пациенты демонстративно игнорируют правила приема, что напрямую сказывается на работе хирургеонов. Нижайше прошу вашего вмешательства!"

languages.text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}Vivisector Martinax is so overcome with indignation that his voice rings out, filling the air. {/n} "Some patients are deliberately flouting the rules of admission, which is directly affecting the chirurgeons' work. I humbly request your intervention!"
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость!" {n}Вивисектор Мартинакс переполнен возмущением настолько, что его голос звенит, заполняя собой эфир. {/n} "Некоторые пациенты демонстративно игнорируют правила приема, что напрямую сказывается на работе хирургеонов. Нижайше прошу вашего вмешательства!"

traits.locale_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}Vivisector Martinax is so overcome with indignation that his voice rings out, filling the air. {/n} "Some patients are deliberately flouting the rules of admission, which is directly affecting the chirurgeons' work. I humbly request your intervention!"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}Vivisector Martinax is so overcome with indignation that his voice rings out, filling the air. {/n} "Some patients are deliberately flouting the rules of admission, which is directly affecting the chirurgeons' work. I humbly request your intervention!"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}Vivisector Martinax is so overcome with indignation that his voice rings out, filling the air. {/n} "Some patients are deliberately flouting the rules of admission, which is directly affecting the chirurgeons' work. I humbly request your intervention!"

languages.text: 「御{mf|御殿|御殿}様！」{n}解剖師マーティナックスは憤慨のあまり、声を張り上げて叫んだ。{/n}「患者の中には、入院規則を故意に破る者もおり、そのせいで外科医の仕事に支障が出ております。御{mf|御殿|御殿}様の御介入を、お願申し上げます！」
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}Vivisector Martinax is so overcome with indignation that his voice rings out, filling the air. {/n} "Some patients are deliberately flouting the rules of admission, which is directly affecting the chirurgeons' work. I humbly request your intervention!"

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!" {n}Dirikesimci Martinax, o kadar öfkelenmiş ki sesi çınlayarak havayı dolduruyor.{/n} "Bazı hastalar kabul kurallarını kasten hiçe sayıyor, bu da cerrahların işini doğrudan etkiliyor. Müdahalenizi istirham ediyorum!"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}Vivisector Martinax is so overcome with indignation that his voice rings out, filling the air. {/n} "Some patients are deliberately flouting the rules of admission, which is directly affecting the chirurgeons' work. I humbly request your intervention!"

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!" {n}Dirikesimci Martinax, o kadar öfkelenmiş ki sesi çınlayarak havayı dolduruyor.{/n} "Bazı hastalar kabul kurallarını kasten hiçe sayıyor, bu da cerrahların işini doğrudan etkiliyor. Müdahalenizi istirham ediyorum!"

languages.text: “大人！”{n}解剖者马丁纳克斯愤慨激昂的声音在空气中回荡。{/n}“部分病患故意破坏接诊秩序，已直接影响船医工作进程。恳请您亲自出面干预！”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}Vivisector Martinax is so overcome with indignation that his voice rings out, filling the air. {/n} "Some patients are deliberately flouting the rules of admission, which is directly affecting the chirurgeons' work. I humbly request your intervention!"

traits.locale_text: “大人！”{n}解剖者马丁纳克斯愤慨激昂的声音在空气中回荡。{/n}“部分病患故意破坏接诊秩序，已直接影响船医工作进程。恳请您亲自出面干预！”

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!" {n}Vivisektor Martinax ist derart empört, dass er seine Stimme erhebt. {/n} "Einige Patienten setzen sich über die Aufnahmebedingungen hinweg, was direkte Auswirkungen auf die Arbeit des Chirurgeums hat. Ich bitte untertänigst um Euer Eingreifen!"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}Vivisector Martinax is so overcome with indignation that his voice rings out, filling the air. {/n} "Some patients are deliberately flouting the rules of admission, which is directly affecting the chirurgeons' work. I humbly request your intervention!"

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!" {n}Vivisektor Martinax ist derart empört, dass er seine Stimme erhebt. {/n} "Einige Patienten setzen sich über die Aufnahmebedingungen hinweg, was direkte Auswirkungen auf die Arbeit des Chirurgeums hat. Ich bitte untertänigst um Euer Eingreifen!"

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie ! » {n}Le vivisecteur Martinax est en proie à une indignation telle que sa voix retentit à travers toute la pièce.{/n} « Certains patients enfreignent délibérément les règles d'admission, ce qui affecte directement le travail des chirurgeons. J'en appelle humblement à votre intervention ! »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}Vivisector Martinax is so overcome with indignation that his voice rings out, filling the air. {/n} "Some patients are deliberately flouting the rules of admission, which is directly affecting the chirurgeons' work. I humbly request your intervention!"

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie ! » {n}Le vivisecteur Martinax est en proie à une indignation telle que sa voix retentit à travers toute la pièce. {/n}« Certains patients enfreignent délibérément les règles d'admission, ce qui affecte directement le travail des chirurgeons. J'en appelle humblement à votre intervention ! »

languages.text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}!». {n}El vivisector Martinax está tan indignado que su voz retumba, llenando el aire. {/n} «Hay pacientes saltándose abiertamente las reglas de ingreso, lo que afecta directamente a la labor de los cirujanos. ¡Solicito humildemente su intervención!».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}Vivisector Martinax is so overcome with indignation that his voice rings out, filling the air. {/n} "Some patients are deliberately flouting the rules of admission, which is directly affecting the chirurgeons' work. I humbly request your intervention!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}!». {n}El vivisector Martinax está tan indignado que su voz retumba, llenando el aire. {/n} «Hay pacientes saltándose abiertamente las reglas de ingreso, lo que afecta directamente a la labor de los cirujanos. ¡Solicito humildemente su intervención!».
